content_blocks.text: of a sign, in the 6th, 12th, 3rd and the 4th houses from the Lagna, in the afternoon, in his conjunction with the Moon, in his retrograde motion and when he is in advance of the Sun.

मन्दस्तुलामकरकुंभनृगृहे कलत्रे
याम्यायने निजद्रेक्काणदिने दशायाम् ।
अन्ते गृहस्य समरे यदि कृष्णपक्षे
वक्रे समस्तभवनेषु बलाधिकः स्यात् ॥ ६७ ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
मन्दस्तुलामकरकुंभनृगृहे कलत्रे
याम्यायने निजद्रेक्काणदिने दशायाम् ।
अन्ते गृहस्य समरे यदि कृष्णपक्षे
वक्रे समस्तभवनेषु बलाधिकः स्यात् ॥ ६७ ॥

content_blocks.text: Sloka. 67. Saturn is predominant in Thula, Makara, Kumbha, in the 7th house from the Lagna, in his passage to the south of the Equator, in his own Drekkana, weekday and Dasa, in the concluding portion of a sign, in planetary war, in the dark half of a month, and in all the twelve signs when retrograde.

verse_data.translation: Sloka. 67. Saturn is predominant in Thula, Makara, Kumbha, in the 7th house from the Lagna, in his passage to the south of the Equator, in his own Drekkana, weekday and Dasa, in the concluding portion of a sign, in planetary war, in the dark half of a month, and in all the twelve signs when retrograde.

content_blocks.text:
NOTES.
But according to Garga, Saturn in Tula, Dhanus or Meena identical with the Lagna is capable of conferring royalty on the native; for he says.

तुलाकोदण्डमीनानां लग्नसंस्थः शनैश्चरः ।
करोति भूपतिं जातमन्यराशौ गतायुषम् ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
तुलाकोदण्डमीनानां लग्नसंस्थः शनैश्चरः ।
करोति भूपतिं जातमन्यराशौ गतायुषम् ॥
verse_data.topic: Garga's shloka on Saturn in Lagna

content_blocks.text:
मेषालिकुंभतरुणीष्वृषकर्कटेषु
मेषूरणे च बलवानुरगाधिपः स्यात् ।
कन्यावसानवृषचापधरे निशाया-
मुत्पातकेतुजनने च शिखी बली स्यात् ॥६८॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
मेषालिकुंभतरुणीष्वृषकर्कटेषु
मेषूरणे च बलवानुरगाधिपः स्यात् ।
कन्यावसानवृषचापधरे निशाया-
मुत्पातकेतुजनने च शिखी बली स्यात् ॥६८॥

content_blocks.text: Sloka. 68. In Mesha, Vrischika, Kumbha, Kanya Vrishabha, Kataka, and in the 10th house from the Lagna, Rahu has strength. Ketu dominates over the concluding portion of Kanya, Vrishabha, Dhanus, the night-time generally and over a birth occurring at a period of any striking phenomenon such as an eclipse.

verse_data.translation: Sloka. 68. In Mesha, Vrischika, Kumbha, Kanya Vrishabha, Kataka, and in the 10th house from the Lagna, Rahu has strength. Ketu dominates over the concluding portion of Kanya, Vrishabha, Dhanus, the night-time generally and over a birth occurring at a period of any striking phenomenon such as an eclipse.
verse_data.topic: Translation for strength of Rahu and Ketu

raw_text:
82:
बातकपारिजाते
Adh. II
of a sign, in the 6th, 12th, 3rd and the 4th houses from
the Lagna, in the afternoon, in his conjunction with
the Moon, in his retrograde motion and when he is in
advance of the Sun.
मन्दस्तुलामकरकुंनगृहे कलत्रे
याम्यायने निजहगाणदिने दशायाम् ।
अन्ते गृहस्य समरे यदि कृष्णपक्षे
वक्रे समस्तभवनेषु बलाधिकः स्यात् ॥ ६७ ॥
Sloka. 67. Saturn is predominant in Thula,
Makara, Kumbha, in the 7th house from the Lagna, in
his passage to the south of the Equator, in his own
Drekkana, weekday and Dasa, in the concluding portion
of a sign, in planetary war, in the dark half of a month,
and in all the twelve signs when retrograde.
NOTES.
But according to Garga, Saturn in Tula, Dhanus or Meena
identical with the Lagna is capable of conferring royalty on the
native; for he says.
तुलाकोदण्डमीनानां रूनसंस्थः शनैश्वरः ।
करोति भूपतिं जातमन्यराशौ गतायुषम् ॥
मेषालिकुंभतरुणीष्वृषकर्कटेषु
मेषूरणे च बलवानुरगाधिपः स्यात् ।
कन्यावसानवृषचापधरे निशाया-
मुत्पातकेतुजनने च शिवी बली स्यात् ।।६८।।
Sloka. 68. In Mesha, Vrischika, Kumbha, Kanya
Vrishabha, Kataka, and in the 10th house from the
Lagna, Rahu has strength. Ketu dominates over the
concluding portion of Kanya, Vrishabha, Dhanus, the
night-time generally and over a birth occurring at a
period of any striking phenomenon such as an eclipse.
extraction_notes: OCR misread 'निजद्रेक्काणदिने' as 'निजहगाणदिने' in shloka 67, which was corrected based on context (Drekkana) and visual inspection.; OCR misread 'शिखी' as 'शिवी' in shloka 68, which was corrected as 'Shikhi' is a name for Ketu.
